runTitle: Production Deploy QA - v8.11.142 Frontend and AI Engine Alignment
coveredSurfaces: Release v8.11.142 commit and tag were created and pushed to GitLab
Vercel production /api/version reports version 8.11.142 and commit c1ff8ca54237541d0a3d51316756ae6ddef9ecbe
Cloud Run revision ai-engine-00458-vt2 serves 100% traffic
Cloud Run runtime limits remain cpu=1, memory=512Mi, maxScale=1
Vercel usage check shows no billed usage in the current period
Release smoke passed after initial GitLab runner pending delay

expertAssessments.rationale: This run verified deployment/version propagation and AI Engine health, but did not rerun the conversational five-question AI pack because no new runtime AI behavior was added in the release commit itself.
The run verified Cloud Run health, revision traffic, unauthenticated monitoring boundary, and free-tier runtime limits.
The deployment preserved the expected /monitoring 403 boundary for unauthenticated access.
The tag pipeline initially waited for runner assignment, Vercel manual fallback closed frontend drift, and the GitLab pipeline subsequently completed deploy/deploy_ai_engine/smoke successfully.
Focused release-facing smoke covered the deployment surfaces that were drifted: Frontend version, health, Cloud Run version, revision traffic, auth boundary, and usage guard.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel usage checked after production fallback deploy; current billing period effective=7.3966 USD, billed=0.0000 USD, chargeCount=6699.
Cloud Run ai-engine revision ai-engine-00458-vt2 serves 100% traffic with cpu=1, memory=512Mi, maxScale=1.
usageChecks.evidence: gcloud run services describe ai-engine --region asia-northeast1

completedImprovements.title: Align Frontend and AI Engine production deployments to v8.11.142
completedImprovements.evidence: Frontend /api/version and Cloud Run /health both report 8.11.142; GitLab pipeline 2520832116 completed success.

notes: Base release drift gate was intentionally skipped with RELEASE_REQUIRE_DEPLOYED_BASE=false because production was Frontend v8.11.140 while Cloud Run was v8.11.141; the release was created to close that drift.
Vercel manual fallback was used while GitLab tag pipeline 2520832116 initially stayed pending. The same pipeline later completed successfully.
Production deploy state after verification: Frontend v8.11.142, Cloud Run v8.11.142, Cloud Run revision ai-engine-00458-vt2, Vercel deployment dpl_5Rf1dHnkD7CvvYJ8NfjPWX6GLo5e.
